description.value:
The bodyguard is forbidden from harming any Geisha clan member, especially their own Geisha, whether willingly or by accident. Should the Geisha permit it, they may temporarily allow their bodyguard to harm other clan members in cases of emergency.
Any attempt to hurt a Geisha clan member or their own Geisha results in excruciating pain, rendering the bodyguard incapable of acting for that turn if forced, or for 1 minute if the action was willingly hostile towards any Geisha clan member.

A bodyguard who falls in battle does not die. Instead, they are transported to Hanamachi (The Flower Town), where they will be healed and restored to continue serving their Geisha.
After a long rest, the Geisha can summon the bodyguard back to their side.

As a reaction, the Geisha can summon or teleport her bodyguard to shield her from harm, as long as they are within 30 feet.
The bodyguard interposes themselves between the Geisha and any incoming attacks or harmful effects, granting her total cover.
Even area-of-effect (AoE) attacks will be entirely absorbed by the bodyguard, and the effects or damage are recalculated using the bodyguard's stats.

Jutsu with a range of "self", possessed by the bodyguard, that are meant to protect, heal, or reduce damage (Add AC, Add saving throws bonuses, Add Temp HP, Add DR or similar) can instead be applied to the Geisha (not both) if she is within 30 feet of her bodyguard.
Due to the special seal binding the bodyguard to the Geisha, they are prohibited from learning or using summoning jutsu or any jutsu that summons other creatures.
The bodyguard, once per combat, can cast one jutsu without expeding a jutsu slot.
The bodyguard has a pool of temporary hit points equal to his proficiency modifier +1 + (2 * level). This pool refreshes at the start of every combat.
If the bodyguard uses any type of defensive jutsu with a range of self, both he and the Geisha gain the benefit of the jutsu instead of having to choose who to protect.
As a bonus action, the Gentleman can create a small shield for the Geisha if he is within 25 ft, reducing damage taken by his proficiency modifier.
